P5 Bubble Pop!

Pop bubbles by matching 3 or more of the same color! Aim your launcher, fire bubbles to create matches, and clear the entire board before running out of shots. Plan carefully - detached bubbles fall and earn bonus points! Progress through 4 challenging levels with increasing difficulty, special rock bubbles, and descending ceilings. Earn power-ups: BOMB to clear nearby bubbles and BEAM SHOT to cut through lines. Can you achieve 3 stars on every level?

Arrow Left: Rotate launcher left | Arrow Right: Rotate launcher right | Space: Fire bubble | Shift: Activate BEAM SHOT power-up (when available) | Z: Activate BOMB power-up (when available) | Enter: Start game | Escape: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu
